initial_candidates.sql:
WITH female_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
),
oldest_lowest_salary AS (
    SELECT account_id, avg_salary
    FROM female_avg_salary
    ORDER BY birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
highest_salary AS (
    SELECT AVG(t.amount) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
    ORDER BY AVG(t.amount) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    ols.account_id,
    ols.avg_salary,
    hs.max_avg_salary - ols.avg_salary AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_lowest_salary ols, highest_salary hs;

WITH FemaleAvgSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY a.account_id
),
OldestFemaleWithLowestSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
    ORDER BY avg_salary ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
HighestSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
)
SELECT 
    account_id,
    avg_salary,
    (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM HighestSalary) - avg_salary AS salary_gap
FROM OldestFemaleWithLowestSalary;

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        a.account_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, c.birth_date, a.account_id
),
oldest_lowest_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary
    FROM female_clients
    ORDER BY birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
highest_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary
    FROM female_clients
    ORDER BY avg_salary DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT account_id FROM oldest_lowest_salary) AS account_number,
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM oldest_lowest_salary) AS lowest_avg_salary,
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM highest_salary) AS highest_avg_salary,
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM highest_salary) - (SELECT avg_salary FROM oldest_lowest_salary) AS salary_gap;

WITH female_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
),
oldest_lowest_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary
    FROM female_avg_salary
    ORDER BY birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
highest_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM female_avg_salary
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT account_id FROM oldest_lowest_salary) AS account_id,
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM oldest_lowest_salary) - (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM highest_salary) AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_lowest_salary, highest_salary
LIMIT 1;

WITH female_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        a.account_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
),
oldest_female_lowest_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id
    FROM female_avg_salary
    ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
all_avg_salaries AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    GROUP BY a.account_id
),
max_min_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary,
        MIN(avg_salary) AS min_avg_salary
    FROM all_avg_salaries
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT account_id FROM oldest_female_lowest_avg) AS account_id,
    (SELECT max_avg_salary - min_avg_salary FROM max_min_avg) AS salary_gap;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH FemaleAvgSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        a.account_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
),
RankedFemaleAccounts AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC) AS rn
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
    JOIN client c ON FemaleAvgSalary.client_id = c.client_id
),
LowestSalaryAccount AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary
    FROM RankedFemaleAccounts
    WHERE rn = 1
),
HighestSalaryValue AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
)
SELECT 
    lsa.account_id,
    lsa.avg_salary,
    hmv.max_avg_salary - lsa.avg_salary AS salary_gap
FROM LowestSalaryAccount lsa, HighestSalaryValue hmv;

candidates.sql:
WITH FemaleAvgSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        a.account_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
),
RankedFemaleAccounts AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_salary ASC) AS salary_rank
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
),
HighestSalary AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
)
SELECT 
    r.account_id,
    r.avg_salary,
    (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM HighestSalary) - r.avg_salary AS salary_gap
FROM RankedFemaleAccounts r
WHERE r.salary_rank = 1;

WITH FemaleAvgSalary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        a.account_id,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
),
RankedFemaleAccounts AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC) AS rn
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
    JOIN client c ON FemaleAvgSalary.client_id = c.client_id
),
LowestSalaryAccount AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary
    FROM RankedFemaleAccounts
    WHERE rn = 1
),
HighestSalaryValue AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM FemaleAvgSalary
)
SELECT 
    lsa.account_id,
    lsa.avg_salary,
    hmv.max_avg_salary - lsa.avg_salary AS salary_gap
FROM LowestSalaryAccount lsa, HighestSalaryValue hmv;

WITH female_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.client_id, a.account_id
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC) AS rn_asc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_salary DESC) AS rn_desc
    FROM female_avg_salary
),
oldest_lowest AS (
    SELECT account_id, avg_salary
    FROM ranked
    WHERE rn_asc = 1
),
highest AS (
    SELECT avg_salary AS max_avg_salary
    FROM ranked
    WHERE rn_desc = 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT account_id FROM oldest_lowest) AS account_id,
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM oldest_lowest) - (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM highest) AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_lowest, highest
LIMIT 1;
